Remento.ad_copy: Want to capture your loved one's life story without the hassle of writing and typing? Introducing Remento! Tim Ferriss chose it for his mom, calling it an "A+ investment!" • 80% of life stories are never recorded - don't let that be yours!
Remento.headline: Give Remento as a gift & turn memories into a stunning interactive book.

Remento.ad_copy: I decided I wasn't going to miss the chance to ask so many more questions... Make history for your family. Give a loved one Remento, not a writing assignment, and their timeless stories will be captured forever for the whole family in an interactive hardcover book. Make Family History Easy
Remento.headline: #1 gift for parents

Remento.ad_copy: See why Mark Cuban invested on Shark Tank: "With Remento, you’ll always have the voices of the people you love.” Give your parent something meaningful… not homework. Remento captures their stories by voice, writes them in their own style, and turns them into a beautiful, interactive, color hardcover book for your entire family.
Remento.headline: No typing. No passwords. No tech stress.

Remento.ad_copy: Preserving the stories you love shouldn’t feel like work. With Remento, it’s as easy as talking. No typing. No tech headaches.
Preserving the stories you love shouldn’t feel like work. With Remento, it’s as easy as talking. No typing. No tech headaches.

See why Mark Cuban invested on Shark Tank: "With Remento, you’ll always have the voices of the people you love.” Give your parent something meaningful… not homework. Remento captures their stories by voice, writes them in their own style, and turns them into a beautiful, interactive, color hardcover book for your entire family.
Remento.headline: No typing. No passwords. No tech stress.

Remento.ad_copy: Everyone loves stories. Preserving your family's stories shouldn’t feel like work. With Remento, it’s as easy as talking. No typing. No tech headaches.
For only $99 you get: 📝 No-Write Biographer Service 📘 Hardcover Memoir (in color!)
Remento.headline: 🧠 Digital Family Memory Hub

Remento.ad_copy: Preserving the stories you love shouldn’t feel like work. With Remento, it’s as easy as talking. No typing. No tech headaches.

See why Mark Cuban invested on Shark Tank: "With Remento, you’ll always have the voices of the people you love.” Give your parent something meaningful… not homework. Remento captures their stories by voice, writes them in their own style, and turns them into a beautiful, interactive, color hardcover book for your entire family.
Remento.headline: No typing. No passwords. No tech stress.

Remento.ad_copy: Todos tenemos historias que merecen ser contadas… y ahora pueden vivir para siempre. Le regalé a mi papá algo único: su propio libro de memorias hecho con @getremento. Remento aparecio en Shark Tank y funciona asi, te manda preguntas, grabás tus respuestas en video, y la plataforma convierte esa grabación en texto automáticamente.

With Remento, preserving precious stories is as easy as having a conversation. They will simply speak, and Remento will do the rest. Turning their spoken words into professionally written stories. Each story is paired with a QR code that when scanned, links back to original recordings. This way, you can watch or listen to them anytime as they tell their story. 👆 Pick storytelling prompts/photos 📱 Record spoken answers
Remento.headline: 📖 Remento turns recordings into a book of written stories

ElliQ.ad_copy: Conversation, interaction, and mental stimulation are essential for cognitive health 💡 ElliQ helps support healthy aging by providing meaningful daily engagement and companionship. Companionship that keeps you sharp and active
ElliQ.headline: Companionship that keeps you sharp and active

ElliQ.ad_copy: Conversation, interaction, and mental stimulation are essential for cognitive health 💡 ElliQ helps support healthy aging by providing meaningful daily engagement and companionship.

With ElliQ, getting started takes minutes - not hours. From the moment you plug it in, ElliQ fills your home with meaningful conversation and a sense of connection that fits right into your day. ✨ Plug in and go
ElliQ.headline: ✨ Daily check-ins & reminders

ElliQ.ad_copy: There’s a lot to keep track of. ElliQ helps by sending reminders about appointments, plans, and important moments - and provides company along the way. She makes your life feel simpler and more enjoyable.

A friendly voice. A daily routine. A healthier mind. 💡 ElliQ helps keep minds active and spirits lifted with daily interaction, gentle prompts, and engaging moments that support long-term cognitive health.

A friendly voice. A daily routine. A healthier mind. 💡 ElliQ helps keep minds active and spirits lifted with daily interaction, gentle prompts, and engaging moments that support long-term cognitive health.
A digital care companion designed for healthy, happy aging at home. Get it free today by your local Area Agency on Aging or your Medicaid provider. Apply for a free ElliQ today! Get ElliQ free today
ElliQ.headline: Get ElliQ free today

ElliQ.ad_copy: Conversation, interaction, and mental stimulation are essential for cognitive health 💡 ElliQ helps support healthy aging by providing meaningful daily engagement and companionship.

A digital care companion designed for healthy, happy aging at home. Get it at no cost today by the Area Agency on Aging of Broward County. Check you eligibility today at ElliQ.com/free Apply for a free ElliQ today!
ElliQ.headline: Get it free today

ElliQ.ad_copy: Because no one should feel alone. ElliQ is more than technology - she’s a companion who’s there every day to talk, laugh, and brighten your little moments. From sharing stories to telling jokes, ElliQ brings connection, comfort, and smiles right into your home.
ElliQ.headline: ✨ A friendly voice
